## Security Checklist
- [ ] I have NOT hardcoded any real API keys, tokens, or credentials
- [ ] Any test fixtures use clearly fake/example values only
- [ ] No new external network calls have been introduced (Quell must remain 100% offline)
- [ ] No new dependencies that could exfiltrate data have been added
- [ ] Changes to `SecretScanner.ts` regex patterns have been tested against `npm test`

## Testing
- [ ] `npm run compile` passes with no errors
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] Manually tested against a real workspace
